name: Captivatingly Corruptive Kiss
outcome: One of the three Perpetuas presses against you and wraps her arms around your shoulders while rubbing her tits against your chest amid the passionate makeout session, gazing into your eyes possessively as her tongue roughly entangles yours.|n|Meanwhile, the other two snuggle up to your sides and whisper sweet enticing words into your ears in between soft smooches that seem to ring directly into your melting brain.
miss: One of the three Perpetuas presses against you and wraps her arms around your shoulders while rubbing her tits against your chest amid the passionate makeout session, but you manage to endure the intimate body-to-body makeout!
